languages.original_text: "A radical position that anyone else might consider heretical. But there is a kernel of truth to it perhaps — a person can make apostasy the meaning of his life. However, one could argue that suppressing rebellion is one of the functions of the system, and therefore, paradoxically, rebels enable the system to perform this function by requiring its effectuation."

languages.text: "Радикальная позиция, которую кто-либо иной мог бы счесть еретической. Но доля истины в ней, пожалуй, есть — человек может сделать своим смыслом жизни отступничество. Однако можно поспорить, что подавление бунта — одна из функций системы, а потому, парадоксально, бунтовщики дают ей возможность проявлять сию функцию, обеспечивая ее функционирование".

"A radical position that anyone else might consider heretical. But there is a kernel of truth to it perhaps — a person can make apostasy the meaning of his life. However, one could argue that suppressing rebellion is one of the functions of the system, and therefore, paradoxically, rebels enable the system to perform this function by requiring its effectuation."
languages.original_text: "Радикальная позиция, которую кто-либо иной мог бы счесть еретической. Но доля истины в ней, пожалуй, есть — человек может сделать своим смыслом жизни отступничество. Однако можно поспорить, что подавление бунта — одна из функций системы, а потому, парадоксально, бунтовщики дают ей возможность проявлять сию функцию, обеспечивая ее функционирование".

traits.locale_text: "A radical position that anyone else might consider heretical. But there is a kernel of truth to it perhaps — a person can make apostasy the meaning of his life. However, one could argue that suppressing rebellion is one of the functions of the system, and therefore, paradoxically, rebels enable the system to perform this function by requiring its effectuation."

"A radical position that anyone else might consider heretical. But there is a kernel of truth to it perhaps — a person can make apostasy the meaning of his life. However, one could argue that suppressing rebellion is one of the functions of the system, and therefore, paradoxically, rebels enable the system to perform this function by requiring its effectuation."

"A radical position that anyone else might consider heretical. But there is a kernel of truth to it perhaps — a person can make apostasy the meaning of his life. However, one could argue that suppressing rebellion is one of the functions of the system, and therefore, paradoxically, rebels enable the system to perform this function by requiring its effectuation."

languages.text: «Una posición radical que cualquier otra persona podría considerar herética. Creo que tiene razón en algo: es posible hacer de la apostasía el sentido de una vida. Sin embargo, se podría argumentar que suprimir la rebelión es una de las funciones del sistema y, por lo tanto, paradójicamente, los rebeldes permiten que el sistema realice esta función al exigir su ejecución».
languages.original_text: "A radical position that anyone else might consider heretical. But there is a kernel of truth to it perhaps — a person can make apostasy the meaning of his life. However, one could argue that suppressing rebellion is one of the functions of the system, and therefore, paradoxically, rebels enable the system to perform this function by requiring its effectuation."

traits.locale_text: «Una posición radical que cualquier otra persona podría considerar herética. Creo que tiene razón en algo: es posible hacer de la apostasía el sentido de una vida. Sin embargo, se podría argumentar que suprimir la rebelión es una de las funciones del sistema y, por lo tanto, paradójicamente, los rebeldes permiten que el sistema realice esta función al exigir su ejecución».

languages.text: “这个立场很激进，换作别人可能会被视为异端。但其中或许有一丝道理——一个人可以把叛教当作生命的意义。但话说回来，镇压叛乱本身也是系统的一项职能。因此，矛盾的是，恰恰是因为叛教者的逼迫，系统才得以履行这项职能。”
languages.original_text: "A radical position that anyone else might consider heretical. But there is a kernel of truth to it perhaps — a person can make apostasy the meaning of his life. However, one could argue that suppressing rebellion is one of the functions of the system, and therefore, paradoxically, rebels enable the system to perform this function by requiring its effectuation."

traits.locale_text: “这个立场很激进，换作别人可能会被视为异端。但其中或许有一丝道理——一个人可以把叛教当作生命的意义。但话说回来，镇压叛乱本身也是系统的一项职能。因此，矛盾的是，恰恰是因为叛教者的逼迫，系统才得以履行这项职能。”

languages.text: « Une position radicale, qui, chez qui que ce soit d'autre, serait considérée comme une hérésie. Mais on y trouve peut-être un fond de vérité : une personne peut faire l'apostasie du sens de sa propre vie. Néanmoins, on pourrait également avancer qu'étouffer une révolte fait partie des fonctions du système, et que donc, paradoxalement, les rebelles permettent à ce dernier de remplir cette fonction puisqu'ils lui en offrent l'opportunité. »
languages.original_text: "A radical position that anyone else might consider heretical. But there is a kernel of truth to it perhaps — a person can make apostasy the meaning of his life. However, one could argue that suppressing rebellion is one of the functions of the system, and therefore, paradoxically, rebels enable the system to perform this function by requiring its effectuation."

traits.locale_text: « Une position radicale, qui, chez qui que ce soit d'autre, serait considérée comme une hérésie. Mais on y trouve peut-être un fond de vérité : une personne peut faire l'apostasie du sens de sa propre vie. Néanmoins, on pourrait également avancer qu'étouffer une révolte fait partie des fonctions du système, et que donc, paradoxalement, les rebelles permettent à ce dernier de remplir cette fonction puisqu'ils lui en offrent l'opportunité. »

languages.text: "Eine radikale Position, die jeder andere als ketzerisch erachten könnte. Aber vielleicht enthält sie einen Funken Wahrheit ... eine Person kann Apostasie zum Sinn ihres Lebens erklären. Allerdings könnte man einwenden, dass die Unterdrückung von Rebellion eine der Funktionen des Systems ist und Rebellen dem System paradoxerweise die Ausübung dieser Funktion ermöglichen, da sie ihre Ausführung erforderlich machen.
languages.original_text: "A radical position that anyone else might consider heretical. But there is a kernel of truth to it perhaps — a person can make apostasy the meaning of his life. However, one could argue that suppressing rebellion is one of the functions of the system, and therefore, paradoxically, rebels enable the system to perform this function by requiring its effectuation."

traits.locale_text: "Eine radikale Position, die jeder andere als ketzerisch erachten könnte. Aber vielleicht enthält sie einen Funken Wahrheit ... eine Person kann Apostasie zum Sinn ihres Lebens erklären. Allerdings könnte man einwenden, dass die Unterdrückung von Rebellion eine der Funktionen des Systems ist und Rebellen dem System paradoxerweise die Ausübung dieser Funktion ermöglichen, da sie ihre Ausführung erforderlich machen.

languages.text: 「誰もが異端と考えるような過激な立場だ。しかし、そこにはおそらく真実の核がある-人は背教を人生の意義とすることができる。しかし、反抗を抑圧することはシステムの機能の一つであり、それゆえ、逆説的ではあるが、反抗者はシステムの機能発揮を要求することによって、システムがこの機能を発揮することを可能にするのだと主張することもできる。」
languages.original_text: "A radical position that anyone else might consider heretical. But there is a kernel of truth to it perhaps — a person can make apostasy the meaning of his life. However, one could argue that suppressing rebellion is one of the functions of the system, and therefore, paradoxically, rebels enable the system to perform this function by requiring its effectuation."

traits.locale_text: 「誰もが異端と考えるような過激な立場だ。しかし、そこにはおそらく真実の核がある-人は背教を人生の意義とすることができる。しかし、反抗を抑圧することはシステムの機能の一つであり、それゆえ、逆説的ではあるが、反抗者はシステムの機能発揮を要求することによって、システムがこの機能を発揮することを可能にするのだと主張することもできる。」

languages.text: "Başkalarının kâfirce bulabileceği radikal bir tutum. Ancak belki de bunda bir doğruluk payı vardır... Kişi, dinden dönmeyi hayatının anlamı hâline getirebilir. Bununla birlikte isyanı bastırmanın, sistemin işlevlerinden biri olduğu iddia edilebilir ve bu nedenle paradoksal olarak isyancılar, bunun gerçekleştirilmesini gerektirerek sistemin bu işlevi yerine getirmesini sağlar."
languages.original_text: "A radical position that anyone else might consider heretical. But there is a kernel of truth to it perhaps — a person can make apostasy the meaning of his life. However, one could argue that suppressing rebellion is one of the functions of the system, and therefore, paradoxically, rebels enable the system to perform this function by requiring its effectuation."

traits.locale_text: "Başkalarının kâfirce bulabileceği radikal bir tutum. Ancak belki de bunda bir doğruluk payı vardır... Kişi, dinden dönmeyi hayatının anlamı hâline getirebilir. Bununla birlikte isyanı bastırmanın, sistemin işlevlerinden biri olduğu iddia edilebilir ve bu nedenle paradoksal olarak isyancılar, bunun gerçekleştirilmesini gerektirerek sistemin bu işlevi yerine getirmesini sağlar."
